name: Harvest Circle
seasonal_change: the town swells dramatically at harvest and tightens into reserve-counting discipline when shortages threaten.
seasonal_effects: the town swells dramatically at harvest and tightens into reserve-counting discipline when shortages threaten.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
